creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to PauAmma from comment #3)

If I start at 
<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=bhyve&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-current#AUTHORS> 
then use the menu and button to switch to 12.3-RELEASE: 

* there's "FreeBSD	13.0" near the foot
* reloading and bypassing the cache makes no difference.
